title: Automation: Every SECOND month commencing FEBRUARY
excerpt:
I am trying to setup an automation for every second month commencing February, however the automation will only allow me to commence from January. 
Is there a way to choose which date the commencement begins? 
Thanks

posts.author: TanBB (Tania)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to setup an automation for every second month commencing February, however the automation will only allow me to commence from January.

Is there a way to choose which date the commencement begins?

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tania,

I see where you’re coming from here and will raise this with my team internally.

That said, can I ask if you could instead set up a date column to trigger the automation commencing Feb, and push the date very 2 months from there, to ensure the automation continues triggering:

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TanBB we recently launched a new app “Schedule Recurring Tasks” just for these types of purposes. You can set exact date/month when you want your task to repeat each year or month. Apart from that you can also set target group and status for the created item and also due date to x days post item creation date.

You can easily configure it to repeat every 2nd month commencing from February onwards as you specified in your request.

Please check it out - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

If you want to see the app in action first, checkout the demo here - Schedule Recurring Tasks | Demo
